CVE-2019-5815.title: Type confusion in xsltNumberFormatGetMultipleLevel prior to libxs ...
CVE-2019-5815.summary: Type confusion in xsltNumberFormatGetMultipleLevel prior to libxslt 1.1.33 could allow attackers to potentially exploit heap corruption via crafted XML data.

CVE-2021-30560.title: Use after free in Blink XSLT in Google Chrome prior to 91.0.4472. ...
CVE-2021-30560.summary: Use after free in Blink XSLT in Google Chrome prior to 91.0.4472.164 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page.

CVE-2024-55549.title: xsltGetInheritedNsList in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-f ...
CVE-2024-55549.summary: xsltGetInheritedNsList in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free issue related to exclusion of result prefixes.

CVE-2025-24855.title: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free because,  ...
CVE-2025-24855.summary: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free because, in nested XPath evaluations, an XPath context node can be modified but never restored. This is related to xsltNumberFormatGetValue, xsltEvalXPathPredicate, xsltEvalXPathStringNs, and xsltComputeSortResultInternal.

CVE-2021-30560.summary: Use after free in Blink XSLT in Google Chrome prior to 91.0.4472.164 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page.

CVE-2023-40403.title: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue ...
CVE-2023-40403.summary: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in macOS Ventura 13.6, tvOS 17, iOS 16.7 and iPadOS 16.7, macOS Monterey 12.7, watchOS 10, iOS 17 and iPadOS 17, macOS Sonoma 14. Processing web content may disclose sensitive information.

CVE-2024-55549.summary: xsltGetInheritedNsList in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free issue related to exclusion of result prefixes.

CVE-2025-10911.title: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in libxslt while parsing ...
CVE-2025-10911.summary: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in libxslt while parsing xsl nodes that may lead to the dereference of expired pointers and application crash.

CVE-2025-24855.title: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free because,  ...
CVE-2025-24855.summary: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free because, in nested XPath evaluations, an XPath context node can be modified but never restored. This is related to xsltNumberFormatGetValue, xsltEvalXPathPredicate, xsltEvalXPathStringNs, and xsltComputeSortResultInternal.

CVE-2025-7424.title: A flaw was found in the libxslt library. The same memory field, p ...
CVE-2025-7424.summary: A flaw was found in the libxslt library. The same memory field, psvi, is used for both stylesheet and input data, which can lead to type confusion during XML transformations. This vulnerability allows an attacker to crash the application or corrupt memory. In some cases, it may lead to denial of service or unexpected behavior.

CVE-2025-7425.title: A flaw was found in libxslt where the attribute type, atype, flag ...
CVE-2025-7425.summary: A flaw was found in libxslt where the attribute type, atype, flags are modified in a way that corrupts internal memory management. When XSLT functions, such as the key() process, result in tree fragments, this corruption prevents the proper cleanup of ID attributes. As a result, the system may access freed memory, causing crashes or enabling attackers to trigger heap corruption.
